# taikun_accounts (Data Source)

Taikun Accounts Data Source

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "taikun_accounts" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `accounts` (List of Object) List of accounts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--accounts))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `accounts`

Read-Only:

- `groups_count` (Number)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organizations_count` (Number)
- `projects_count` (Number)
- `users_count` (Number)
